title: Lucid (NASDAQ: LCID) Stock Price Prediction and Forecast 2026-2030
text: 24/7 Wall St provides updated stock price predictions for Lucid through 2030. The forecast reflects Q1 2026 earnings miss and reflects more cautious assumptions about execution. 2026 forecast revised lower to reflect near-term profitability unlikely. 2027-2030 forecasts show gradual improvement if Gravity ramps successfully and robotaxi revenue materializes. The analysis maintains view that Lucid is high-risk stock suitable only for investors with substantial risk tolerance and long-term horizon. The forecast emphasizes need for patience as company works through current challenges.
